name: Spellcasting Focus
definition: An object used in place of spell Material components
full_text: A Spellcasting Focus is an object that certain creatures can use in place of a spell's Material components if those materials aren't consumed by the spell and don't have a cost specified. Some classes allow its members to use certain types of Spellcasting Focuses.

mechanics.requirement: Materials must not be consumed and have no cost specified
